description_long: This is a futuristic, science fiction-inspired airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and four extended wings, each equipped with cylindrical engine pods and pointed tips. The main body is predominantly black with metallic red accents, giving it a high-tech, armored appearance. The cockpit is situated at the front of the fuselage, featuring a faceted canopy with a slightly raised profile. The wings are arranged in an X-configuration, with two upper and two lower wings, each displaying detailed paneling and vent-like structures. The rear of the airplane features a large, circular exhaust port, suggesting a jet or rocket propulsion system. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced fighter aircraft, with aggressive lines and a compact, agile form.
description: A sleek, black and red sci-fi airplane with four wing-mounted engines, an X-shaped wing configuration, and a faceted front cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, faceted cockpit canopy, and the X-shaped wing arrangement with visible engine pods.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, stacked wing configuration, and cylindrical engines extending from the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large circular exhaust port, symmetrical engine placement, and the angular tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing structure and engine alignment.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing X-configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; wings are paired in upper and lower sets with slight dihedral.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted at the ends of each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear based on design, but not shown in images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy, likely single-seat based on size and design.
